top_signals.title: 88% of UK Customers Would Switch Banks Due to Financial Crime Failures, ThetaRay Report Finds
top_signals.summary: ThetaRay, a global leader in AI financial crime compliance, today released The ThetaRay UK Banking & Fintech Trust Report 2026. The findings, launched on the eve of The Global RegTech Summit, reveal a systemic shift in consumer behavior: 88% of UK customers are prepared to abandon their primary financial institutions over failures in preventing money [...]
